title: T-009 — quality_audit_log table + audit triggers on quality_holds
prompt:
# T-009 — quality_audit_log + audit triggers

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §5.2 quality_audit_log DDL, §9.1 audit_hold_change trigger, §13.3 audit log completeness
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `quality_audit_log` table with retention_until and indexes per §5.2, plus the audit_hold_change trigger function and triggers on quality_holds (INSERT + UPDATE) per §9.1.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0103_quality_audit_log.sql` creates quality_audit_log per §5.2 verbatim (BIGSERIAL PK, occurred_at, table_name, record_id, operation, old_data, new_data, changed_fields, user_id, session_id, change_reason, ip_address, user_agent, request_id, retention_until GENERATED) plus idx_audit_record and idx_audit_user indexes; ENABLE RLS with tenant_isolation.
2. CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION raise_immutable_error() per §9.1.
3. CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION audit_hold_change() per §9.1 (with changed_fields jsonb_each diff, request_id from current_setting).
4. CREATE TRIGGER audit_hold_insert AFTER INSERT and audit_hold_update AFTER UPDATE on quality_holds FOR EACH ROW.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0103_quality_audit_log.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/quality-audit-log.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0103 applied, when \d quality_audit_log runs, then all §5.2 columns exist (operation, old_data jsonb, new_data jsonb, changed_fields text[], retention_until GENERATED) and RLS is enabled
2. Given a quality_holds INSERT under app.current_user_id and app.current_org_id settings, when the trigger fires, then exactly 1 quality_audit_log row is appended with operation='INSERT', new_data set, old_data NULL, user_id matching the setting
3. Given an existing quality_holds row, when UPDATE changes hold_status from 'open' to 'released', then 1 quality_audit_log row is appended with operation='UPDATE', changed_fields containing 'hold_status' and 'released_at'

pipeline_inputs.description: Create quality_audit_log table + raise_immutable_error + audit_hold_change function + INSERT/UPDATE triggers on quality_holds.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0103 emits quality_audit_log DDL per §5.2 verbatim including retention_until GENERATED 7y. Functions raise_immutable_error (RAISE EXCEPTION) and audit_hold_change (compute changed_fields via jsonb_each, INSERT into log). Triggers AFTER INSERT and AFTER UPDATE on quality_holds. RLS tenant_isolation policy on quality_audit_log itself.
out_of_scope: Do not add triggers on quality_inspections / specs / NCR / monitoring here (T-040 covers cross-table triggers)
Do not implement immutability triggers on signed records (T-040)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0103 applied, when \d quality_audit_log runs, then all §5.2 columns exist (operation, old_data jsonb, new_data jsonb, changed_fields text[], retention_until GENERATED) and RLS is enabled

Given a quality_holds INSERT with app.current_user_id and app.current_org_id set, when the trigger fires, then exactly 1 quality_audit_log row appears with operation='INSERT', new_data populated, old_data NULL, and user_id matching the setting

Given an existing quality_holds row, when UPDATE flips hold_status open->released, then 1 audit row is appended with operation='UPDATE' and changed_fields containing both 'hold_status' and 'released_at'
test_strategy: RED: write packages/db/__tests__/quality-audit-log.test.ts asserting schema, INSERT trigger, and UPDATE diff capture before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test quality-audit-log'
risk_red_lines: Do not allow RLS bypass on the audit log itself
Do not omit retention_until GENERATED 7y column (BRCGS Issue 10)
Do not allow triggers to swallow errors silently (RAISE on missing app.current_user_id)
